title: UN R156 7.1.1 — Software update management: OTA deployment tracking and integrity verification
exclusions: Does NOT substitute for the full regulatory control set; this UC provides one of several evidence streams and must be combined with policy, procedure, and supplemental UCs to demonstrate the complete clause.
evidence: Scheduled search output persisted to the compliance summary index with regulation=UN R156, clause=7.1.1, available as a saved search and exportable as a CSV evidence pack for the responsible officer.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Uplifted from contributing to partial: UC provides meaningful monitoring evidence for 7.1.1.
compliance.controlObjective: Evidence that UN R156 7.1.1 (Software update management system processes) is enforced — Splunk UC-22.50.42.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.50.42' running on catalogue-defined data sources, archived to the restricted audit_evidence index (default 7-year retention).
compliance.smeCaveat: Phase-C draft: SME review required before uplifting assurance from 'contributing' to 'partial' or 'full'. Confirm that the SPL captures the specific regulator expectation and that the telemetry exists in the deployment.

dataSources: OTA update server logs, vehicle telematics update status, firmware verification records, update campaign management databases.
spl:
index=ota_updates sourcetype IN (ota_campaign, ota_vehicle_status) earliest=-30d
| eval update_successful=if(status IN ("installed", "verified", "activated"), 1, 0)
| eval integrity_verified=if(signature_check="pass" AND hash_check="pass", 1, 0)
| stats count AS total_updates sum(update_successful) AS successful sum(integrity_verified) AS integrity_pass dc(vin) AS vehicles_targeted latest(campaign_date) AS last_campaign BY campaign_id, software_version, vehicle_model
| eval success_pct=round(100*successful/total_updates, 1)
| eval integrity_pct=round(100*integrity_pass/total_updates, 1)
| where success_pct<100 OR integrity_pct<100
| table campaign_id, vehicle_model, software_version, total_updates, success_pct, integrity_pct, vehicles_targeted, last_campaign
description: Monitors OTA software update campaign success rates, integrity verification, and deployment coverage per UN R156 7.1.1 requirements for software update management system processes.
value: UN R156 requires a validated SUMS (Software Update Management System). Tracking deployment success and integrity verification provides auditable evidence that the update process is secure and complete.
implementation: (1) Ingest OTA campaign and vehicle update status events; (2) normalise signature_check, hash_check, status fields; (3) schedule per-campaign; (4) escalate integrity failures immediately. Indexes required: `index=ota_updates`; Sourcetypes: `sourcetype=ota_campaign`, `sourcetype=ota_vehicle_status`.
visualization: Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner. Key fields: `campaign_id`, `integrity_pass`, `integrity_pct`, `integrity_verified`, `last_campaign`, `software_version`.
knownFalsePositives: Tier-2 framework drift during quarterly reviews, scheduled crosswalk updates, or controlled exception cycles.
grandmaExplanation: We help you show how a second-line framework line maps to what you actually monitor, so your gap story stays clear.
